details.IncidentDetail: "[14] PER THE INV PTY // FORD FUSION --- THE OTHER VEH WAS PRIOR 23103 // TAILGATING // RUDE HAND GESTURE // THREW WATER BOTTLE THAT CAUSED THE RP TO SWERVE AND CAUSE THE TC [Shared]"
